### Styles

GST-025 (G-String) · MTB-025 (Mid-Rise Thong, Cotton & Mesh) · HWH-025 (High Waist Hipster) · HCB-025 (High Cut Brief)

### Key Terms

- 3 revisions included per design for tech packs/patterns
- Sample amendments generally not possible (physical work)
- Late fee: 2% per month on overdue invoices
- Delayed client feedback fee: 1% per week
- 7-day written notice required for termination
- Cancellation requires payment for completed work

## Current Issues

### Jan 29, 2026 - Quality Failures

**High Waist Hipster:**
- Wrong fabric (100% pima cotton vs Supima/Modal per tech pack)
- Missing tunneled leg elastic per tech pack
- Unexpected back seam
- Incorrect gusset width and side seam length

**G-String:**
- Incorrect waistband specs
- POMs out of spec
- Doesn't match email revisions

**High Cut Brief:**
- Tapering instructions from emails ignored
- Specs don't match email revisions

**Caroline's response:** Admitted fault for wrong fabric and missing leg elastic - was checking callouts and graded specs but not the BOM.

### Earlier Issues

**Oct 31, 2025 - Early Warning:** Leslye noticed samples measuring off from tech pack specs during initial work. Asked which measurements to use - written specs or actual sample measurements.

**Dec 6, 2025 - G-String Discrepancies:** XS/S sample didn't match specs (gusset 4.5" vs 4", back seam 2.25" vs 1.75", back waist 3.25" vs 2.75"). Diane took responsibility for QC breakdown due to timeline pressure from unusable factory files.

### Cancelled & Paused Work

**Cancelled:**
- HWH (Heather Grey L/XL, Teal 1X/2X, Teal XS/S)
- Mesh Thong (Lavender L/XL)

**Paused:**
- Cotton Thong (all sizes)
- HCB Round #3
- GST Round #3
- HWH Round #2
- HWH Round #1 remake
